\subsection*{Title}
Inter-Modal Transfer Rate

\subsection*{Canonical Statement}
\begin{verbatim}
The inter-modal transfer rate \(T_{\mathrm{IM}}\) between two modes \(m_1, m_2\) of a field \(\phi\) is defined by \[ T_{\mathrm{IM}} \;=\; \frac{1}{u_T} \int_{\Sigma} \phi_{m_1}^* \, \mathcal{L} \, \phi_{m_2} \, \mathrm{d}\Sigma, \] where \(\mathcal{L}\) is the Trawinistic Lagrangian density and \(\Sigma\) is a hypersurface away from the TZP.\\\
\end{verbatim}
